data.title: Former SEC Chair Gensler Warns All Cryptos Are Risky — Except Bitcoin
data.description:
Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler cautioned that cryptocurrencies beyond Bitcoin lack fundamental backing, while Vanguard's dramatic policy reversal granted 50 million clients access to spot crypto ETFs, triggering $1 billion in immediate trading volume.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/former-sec-chair-gensler-warns-all-cryptos-are-risky-except-bitcoin/

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $92K as Fear Eases and SUI, LINK, 2Z Surge
data.description:
Altcoin Season has stayed constrained while Bitcoin has rebounded above $92,000 and the fear index has improved to 22, as Sui, Chainlink and DoubleZero have posted double-digit gains on new access, steady utility and rotation into mid cap tokens.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/altcoin-season-gasps-as-sui-link-and-2z-push-higher/

data.title: Revolut adds support for Solana’s network
data.description:
Revolut added full support for the Solana network, adding SOL for transfers, as well as withdrawals. Previously, SOL was only available for in-app trading.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/revolut-adds-support-for-solanas-network/

data.title: WhiteBIT’s WBT token included in 5 S&P Dow Jones crypto indices
data.description:
WhiteBIT’s native crypto coin WBT has been added to S&P Dow Jones crypto indices after meeting institutional standards set by the US stock and crypto market tracker, joining exchanges Coinbase and Robinhood. In a post on X, WhiteBIT CEO Volodymyr Nosov announced on Wednesday that WBT is featured in five S&P Dow Jones benchmark families […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whitebits-wbt-token-included-in-sp-dow-jones/

data.title: Bitmine Buys Another 18,345 Ethereum ($54.94M) In Fresh Accumulation Push – Details
data.description:
Ethereum has reclaimed the $3,000 level after a strong market reaction to improving macro conditions, offering investors a much-needed shift in momentum. The move comes just days after the Federal Reserve officially ended Quantitative Tightening (QT), a policy shift that immediately boosted liquidity expectations across all risk assets. With markets now pricing in an imminent interest rate cut, confidence has begun to return, and ETH is one of the first major assets to respond. Related Reading: Bitcoin Liquidation Dominance Hits Multi-Year High: The Real Cause Behind BTC’s Breakdown This rebound reflects more than just macro relief
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/bitmine-buys-another-18345-ethereum-54-94m-in-fresh-accumulation-push-details/
